title: SEC1: send_whisper missing from wasm public API
description: wasm/src/client.rs:281 implements send_whisper() on NieRelayClient but it is not wrapped with #[wasm_bindgen] in wasm/src/api.rs. The UI already renders whisper_received events (index.html:173) but has no way to send a whisper — the JS-facing NieClient struct has no send_whisper method. Fix: add a pub fn send_whisper(&self, to: String, text: String) -> js_sys::Promise method to the #[wasm_bindgen] impl NieClient block in api.rs, following the same pattern as send_message.
close_reason: duplicate of nie-7bv6.25: both report send_whisper missing from NieClient wasm_bindgen API; SEC0 filing is primary
